prompt: I'm testing metadata create throughput on a multi-MDT setup

assertions.name: collects_mds_params
assertions.description: Gets MDT count, MDS thread pools, and DNE config (striped dirs, remote rename)

assertions.name: uses_tables
assertions.description: Presents data in structured tables or lists, not raw JSON dump

assertions.name: offers_followup
assertions.description: Asks if the user wants more detail or data from a different subsystem
